Cinema and Television

About the Department

MENU

Cinema and Televison Department aims to educate students which they can be successfull and creative in the branchs of filmmaking, advertising, television broadcast and production. Besides the practical and theoratical studies, our students can realize their personal practices of works and benefit from the technical infrastructure of our school.
